content:
I need to multiply 2a3 × 510 in base 11.

First, let me convert to base 10 to make the calculation easier:
- 2a3 (base 11) = 2×11² + 10×11¹ + 3×11⁰ = 2×121 + 10×11 + 3 = 242 + 110 + 3 = 355 (base 10)
- 510 (base 11) = 5×11² + 1×11¹ + 0×11⁰ = 5×121 + 11 + 0 = 605 + 11 = 616 (base 10)

Now multiply in base 10:
355 × 616 = 218,680 (base 10)

Now convert 218,680 back to base 11:
218,680 ÷ 11 = 19,880 remainder 0
19,880 ÷ 11 = 1,807 remainder 3
1,807 ÷ 11 = 164 remainder 3
164 ÷ 11 = 14 remainder 10 (a in base 11)
14 ÷ 11 = 1 remainder 3
1 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 1

Reading the remainders from bottom to top: 13a330

13a330
